We've completely rebuilt them – more styles, more layouts, richer detail, and editing that keeps the structure and polish intact. Here's what's new:

✅ Way more flowchart styles and layouts – simple or detailed, vertical or horizontal, with or without icons, all polished out of the box
✅ Easy to customize – change colors, swap icons, switch layouts and branding styles, all without regenerating
✅ Easy to update – add or remove steps, rearrange the flow, and the structure adjusts cleanly
✅ Transform with Effects – apply preset styles or describe your own for a completely different feel

#napkinai #visualai #flowcharts

profile_bio.description: Napkin empowers anyone to communicate their ideas visually. Transform your text into compelling visuals perfect for presentations, blogs and more at https://t.co/TUGnuPEs6l

tweets.text: Try the upgraded flowcharts now at https://t.co/GcU0kDmfhp and let us know your feedback in the comments!
